title: carya ovata f. ellipsoidalis
intro: Carya ovata f. ellipsoidalis, also known as the American white elm or white elm, is a deciduous tree species native to eastern and central North America. The bark of Carya ovata f. ellipsoidalis contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu, providing various health benefits. Carya ovata f. ellipsoidalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various ailments.
